content.query:
SELECT
mld.[Division]
,mld.[LP_MilestoneDateTypeID]
,mdt.[MilestoneDateType]
,mdt.Active
,count(mld.[MilestoneDetailID]) as MilestoneCount
,count(distinct mld.[JobID]) as JobCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL] mld
 ,[EDW].[DIM_MILESTONE_DATE_TYPE] mdt
 where
 mld.MilestoneDateTypeID = mdt.MilestoneDateTypeID
 group by
 mld.[Division]
,mld.[LP_MilestoneDateTypeID]
,mdt.[MilestoneDateType]
,mdt.Active
order by 
mld.[Division]
,mdt.Active desc
,MilestoneCount desc
